description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist white facade. The front features a double garage with a car parked inside, a paved driveway, and a small fenced yard with a swing set. Large windows and glass doors provide ample natural light, and a balcony with a hot tub is visible on the side. The rear of the house is more private, with fewer windows and a simple, clean design. The house includes multiple entry points, outdoor seating, and a chimney, suggesting a fireplace inside.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and a balcony with a hot tub.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, driveway with a car, main entrance, and a fenced yard with a swing set.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the balcony with a hot tub, swing set, and rear garage doors.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows, a balcony, and a clean, unadorned facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the swing set, garage, and part of the paved yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door with glass panels, no porch, and a paved approach adjacent to the garage.
